economic_notes: 50% interest in M'Anishnabek Industries Limited Partnership (dissolved in fiscal 2020) for quarry and rail spur opportunities. Economic Development Corporation consolidated. Waubetek Business Development Corporation mortgage taken out.
notes: Two fully consolidated subsidiaries: Serpent River First Nation Economic Development Corporation and Serpent River First Nation Non-Profit Housing. One GBE: M'Anishnabek Industries Limited Partnership (50% interest, dissolved in fiscal 2020). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + Province of Ontario + Government of Canada + OFNLP + North Shore Tribal Council + Health Canada/CMHC-related items recognized = 5172697+1350421+1646608+962243+855941 = 9988910 approx. OSR includes sales, rental, interest, residence fees, other revenue. No remuneration schedule included in the provided pages. Annual debt service reflects long-term debt repayments only per cash flow statement.
